en.name: Level 75 — Liminality
en.shortDescription: Sandy corridors of peeling painted walls, sun-like light and endless rain sounds, scattered with children's toys and old footprints.
en.atmosphere: An eerie yet soothing emptiness that evokes childhood memories despite the cracked paint and abandoned rooms.
en.tips: Mostly accessible to younger travelers — adults usually need an accompanying child. Windows and doorways make easy exits.
